name: Texas Trust Credit Union
description_short: Texas Trust Credit Union is a member-owned financial institution offering checking, savings, loans, credit cards, and digital banking services with a focus on member loyalty rewards.
description_long: Texas Trust Credit Union has built a 50+ year legacy as a member-focused financial cooperative, as evidenced by their testimonial of a member with over 50 years of tenure. The institution operates as a traditional credit union (routing number 311979875) providing comprehensive consumer and business financial services through their website at family1stfcu.org. They emphasize community partnerships and member engagement through their foundation and financial wellbeing programs. The credit union offers a wide range of deposit and lending products. On the deposit side, they provide multiple checking account tiers (Bonus, Power, Easy, Student), savings accounts, money market accounts, and CDs (currently up to 3.88% APY on 13-month terms with $500 minimum). Lending products include auto loans (as low as 5.24% APR), home loans (6.497% APR), personal loans (8.99% APR), student loans, and business loans. They also issue three MasterCard variants (Platinum, Rewards, Secured) starting at 9.90% APR, plus business credit cards. Digital services include online banking, a mobile app, digital wallet, and various financial calculators. Texas Trust distinguishes itself through several member-centric initiatives. Their newly launched True Blue Loyalty Rewards program recognizes engaged members with exclusive perks and benefits that increase with relationship depth. They offer free Greenlight money app and debit card access for members (a youth financial literacy product), free VIP theater access with their debit/credit cards, and free financial wellbeing courses and resources. The credit union also partners with community organizations and maintains a physical presence with multiple locations and ATMs. As a credit union, Texas Trust provides member-owned governance and NCUA insurance protections up to $250,000 per deposit category. However, consumers should verify current rates and specific terms before applying, as rates shown are subject to change. The True Blue Loyalty Rewards program details regarding specific perks at each tier are not fully disclosed on the homepage, requiring further investigation. Like most credit unions, membership eligibility may have geographic or other restrictions not detailed on their main website.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: True Blue Loyalty Rewards program with tiered exclusive perks and benefits for engaged members
Competitive CD rates (3.88% APY on 13-month) with low $500 minimum deposit
Comprehensive checking account options including bonus checking and student accounts
Free financial wellbeing courses and resources available to members
Free Greenlight youth money app and debit card for members with eligible accounts
Free VIP theater access and express lanes with Texas Trust debit or credit cards
Established 50+ year history demonstrating member retention and institutional stability
cons: True Blue Loyalty Rewards program details are vague—specific perks at each tier are not clearly disclosed on homepage
Auto loans, home loans, and personal loans shown are promotional rates with 'subject to change' disclaimer; actual rates may vary based on creditworthiness
Website indicates membership eligibility but does not clearly state geographic restrictions or membership requirements upfront
CD rates of 3.80-3.88% APY are competitive but not clearly positioned against national benchmarks
Limited transparency on business loan terms, rates, and application process on homepage
best_for: Long-term members seeking tiered loyalty rewards and exclusive perks beyond standard banking
Families interested in youth financial literacy through the free Greenlight money app partnership
Consumers in their service area seeking competitive CD rates with low minimum deposits
Auto and home loan borrowers comparing rates and looking for member-owned institutional stability
diagnosis: Texas Trust Credit Union is best for consumers in their service area seeking stable, member-owned banking with competitive deposit rates, comprehensive lending options, and a modern loyalty rewards program. The primary caveat is that advertised loan rates are promotional and subject to change based on creditworthiness; consumers must verify actual rates during application and confirm membership eligibility requirements before opening accounts.
services: Checking accounts (Bonus, Power, Easy, Student variants)
Savings accounts and money market accounts
Certificates of Deposit (CDs) up to 3.88% APY
Home loans and mortgage refinancing (from 6.497% APR)
MasterCard credit cards (Platinum, Rewards, Secured variants from 9.90% APR)
Business checking and business credit cards
Digital wallet and bill payment tools
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 3501 Western Center Blvd, Fort Worth, TX 76137
meta_description: Texas Trust Credit Union offers checking, savings, loans, credit cards, and digital banking with member loyalty rewards.
